name: Kartoon Studios, Inc.
business: Kartoon Studios, Inc. is a global content and brand management company focused on the creation, production, licensing, and distribution of multimedia animated content for children. The company's main sources of revenue are derived from animation production services provided to third parties, the sale of licenses for the distribution of films and television programs, advertising revenues, and merchandising and licensing sales. Customers include streaming platforms, broadcasters, toy companies, and consumer product companies.

exposures.sentence: Kartoon Studios, Inc. (formerly, Genius Brands International, Inc.) (the Company, Kartoon Studios, we, us or our ) is a global content and brand management company focused on the creation, production, licensing, and distribution of multimedia animated content for children.
A source of our revenue is our licensing and merchandising activities from our underlying IP content.
We are actively implementing AI-driven tools designed to reduce operating costs in areas such as localization and video resolution enhancement.
On December 13, 2024, we experienced a cybersecurity incident involving unauthorized access to one of our management systems.

Changes in U.S. trade policy, including current and proposed tariffs on foreign-produced content, could adversely impact our business operations, particularly due to our reliance on animation production services based in Canada and Asia.

catalysts.sentence: On October 22, 2025, pursuant to the terms of the October 2025 Purchase Agreement, we closed a registered direct offering (the Registered Direct Offering ) of 3,000,000 shares (the October 2025 Shares ) of our common stock, and pre-funded warrants (the October 2025 Pre-Funded Warrants ) to purchase up to 6,903,049 shares of common stock to the October 2025 Investor.
This 2D Preschool series for PBS Kids, which first aired in February 2026, began full production in 2024.

catalysts.event: Final delivery of Unicorn Academy season 2
catalysts.sentence: Mainframe Studios started production on these 16 x 22-minute episodes in 2024 with deliveries ongoing and final delivery due the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Delivery of remaining SuperKitties season 3 episodes
catalysts.sentence: the remaining 23 x 11-minute episodes expected to be delivered by the third quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Commencement of delivery of SuperKitties season 4
catalysts.sentence: Delivery of content expected to commence in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Premiere of Winnie and Friends series and Christmas special
catalysts.sentence: The series is scheduled to premiere in Fall 2026, with a Christmas holiday special debuting in 2026.
